title: Optimizing Spatial Matrices
summary: A deep dive into structuring low-level algorithms for real-time physics and spatial mapping, bypassing CPU bottlenecks during 3D physical reconstructions.
content:
A deep dive into structuring low-level algorithms for real-time physics and spatial mapping, bypassing CPU bottlenecks during 3D physical reconstructions.

In high-performance computing, spatial matrix optimization is crucial. When rendering 3D environments, CPU caching and memory access patterns dictate performance. By converting array-of-structures to structure-of-arrays, we achieved a significant latency reduction.

title: DQN Urban Optimization
summary: How I utilized PyTorch and SUMO simulators to train Deep Q-Networks that autonomously manage arterial gridlocks and reduce overall city carbon emissions.
content:
How I utilized PyTorch and SUMO simulators to train Deep Q-Networks that autonomously manage arterial gridlocks and reduce overall city carbon emissions.

Urban environments represent complex, multi-agent systems where standard traffic control algorithms fall short. By deploying Deep Q-Learning models, intersections adapt dynamically to peak loads. This article explores the reward functions and network architecture required for this task.

title: Architecting FlightOps Logic
summary: Bridging the gap between software design and aviation realities. Exploring the wireframing and logic matrices needed to track pilot certifications safely.
content:
Bridging the gap between software design and aviation realities. Exploring the wireframing and logic matrices needed to track pilot certifications safely.

Aviation software demands zero-tolerance for logical faults. The certification tracking arrays must intertwine seamlessly with rostering engines. We mapped out systemic logic frameworks that provided 100% compliance tracking accuracy for OCC modules.
